title: Add AI Image Forge to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AI Image Forge](https://hilarious-seahorse-09c5c6.netlify.app/) to image
- AI Image Forge is an all-in-one web-based AI art tool integrated with Pollinations.ai API. Enter prompts, choose Pollinations.ai models, and adjust image resolution.

Fixes #10511

gist.headline: Forging new pixels
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! AI Image Forge is an all-in-one web tool for crafting AI art with custom resolutions and models.
gist.summary: Added 'AI Image Forge', a new web-based AI art generation tool built on the Pollinations API, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use AI Image Forge to generate images with custom prompts, models, and resolutions directly from their browser.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'AI Image Forge', an image generation tool. Metaphor: A blacksmith's forge but for pixels/images. Polly the bee as a blacksmith working at a glowing forge, hammering out glowing pixels or a picture frame. Monitor robot helping.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, hammering glowing square pixels on an anvil in a warm, rustic forge. A chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a freshly forged picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm orange gradient background. Cozy 8-bit aesthetic, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, hammering glowing square pixels on an anvil in a warm, rustic forge. A chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a freshly forged picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm orange gradient background. Cozy 8-bit aesthetic, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
